src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Migrate from legacy InboundConnectorExecutable API to the new generic interface requiring explicit context type parameter.
Replace deprecated property binding and validation methods with the new bindProperties API.
Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE namespace standards.
Remove the @Secret annotation which is no longer present in the new SDK version or usage pattern.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21 instead of Java 17.

.github/workflows/CI.yaml.general_idea: Update the CI workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 17 to align with the target JDK migration.

.tool-versions.general_idea: Update the local development Java runtime from version 11 to version 21 to align with the target JDK.

src/test/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Rename the Zeebe client configuration property to align with the updated Connector SDK API.
